notes: Single shared ParseRoleFile/validator serves both corpora; phase inferred from dir; dedup review-side (cluster.go), staleness phase-parameterized (rolehash.go).
outputContractInstruction injects fixed contract (role/location/class/severity, +status for audit); rolefile.go allowedRoleKeys rejects any output-schema key.
tp emits prompts and instructs orchestrator to spawn sub-agents; never executes agents (nongoals_test TestNonGoals_EmitsPromptsNoRuntime).
No new config knob; mechanize_candidates unchanged and no found_by threshold added (review_report.go 456-501).
Project with zero role files runs the embedded default corpus via DefaultCorpus fallback.
validateRole enforces id==stem, kebab-case regex, and reserved regression rejection.
title required (non-blank) and carried in model.Role.Title; used as prompt label.
instructions required (non-blank); emitted as the role's system-prompt body.
focus optional string[]; appended to review prompt / audit checklist focus (review.go 874-877, audit_roles.go 126-128).
domains optional string[]; roleAppliesToDomain treats empty/absent as every domain.
reviewers: software implementer/tester/architect, prose coherence/soundness; corpus JSON files present.
auditors: software spec-coverage/security/maintainability-conventions, prose spec-coverage/soundness; corpus JSON files present.
Domain persona-swap replaced by domain-selected embedded corpora; review.go passes fmState.Domain only to corpus selection.
Project-wide concerns are role files under .tp/reviewers|auditors, discovered once.
Spec-local concerns handled by tp.review_roles/audit_roles focus overrides (frontmatter.go 129-193).
TestNonGoals_EmitsPromptsNoRuntime asserts prompts emitted and instruction says spawn sub-agents.
Unknown top-level key (output_schema) rejected; output contract stays tp's.
TestNonGoals_NoAutoTaper: panel size unchanged across recorded rounds.
TestNonGoals_NoNewConfigWorkflowField: config output has no review_roles/roles_hash/eject knob.
Speculative field (weight) beyond schema rejected as unknown top-level key.
TestNonGoals_NoNewRoleFromFrontmatter: unknown override id creates no new role.
TestNonGoals_NoCrossProjectCorpus: .tp/ above git boundary is never read.
TestNonGoals_NoAuditClustering: two same-(location,class) FAIL rows stay two findings; audit --record unchanged.
One distinct failure-lens per role, ties to overlap_report trim candidates.
Adversarial framing (refute/find where it breaks) guidance present.
Evidence demand: every finding carries a location and a why.
Scope boundaries: state what the role does NOT cover so lenses stay disjoint.
Output-contract adherence: role customizes only focus, never the schema.
model.Role has id/title/instructions plus optional focus/domains; JSON key is focus not lens; role_test.go covers fields and key name.
Shared parser/validator: id==stem, kebab-case, reserved regression, unknown-key rejection, domains-array check; rolefile_test.go covers each rule.
Loads .tp/reviewers|auditors via git-boundary anchor; populated=at-least-one-json; replace vs embedded fallback; non-JSON ignored; rolecorpus_test.go covers all.
Research notes cover adversarial framing, evidence demand, scope boundaries, one-lens-per-role, synthesis for corpus authoring, and sources.
Embedded corpus via go:embed; §5.1 table order; 10 role JSON files present exemplifying authoring guidance; defaultcorpus_test.go asserts corpus matches table.
Domain selects embedded corpus, filters user roles by domains, empty-panel fallback to full embedded panel, unknown-domain warns and falls back to software; corpusdomain_test.go covers all.
sha256 over user files sorted by repo-relative path with CRLF-normalized content; builtin sentinel when none; regression never included; rolehash_test.go covers sentinel/stability/CRLF.
Emits one prompt per active reviewer from domain-filtered corpus (replacing hardcoded trio); built-in regression appended, reserved-id enforced so it cannot be a corpus file/ejected.
tp audit resolves auditor corpus by domain, layers overrides, emits one prompt per role via generateRoleAuditPrompts (audit_roles.go 173-196).
outputContractInstruction stamps role/location/class/severity for review; audit_roles.go 160 adds status for audit; emission_contract_test.go asserts both.
LocationKey takes first section token via FindString; exact-match so 8 and 8.2 differ; no-token uses trimmed verbatim; location_test.go covers cases.
ClusterFindings groups by (location key, class) after trim; empty-after-trim class forms singleton; cluster_test.go covers equal-key/trim/absent-class.
Representative by severity>role>text; Attribution excludes regression/blank roles, found_by=cardinality; cluster_attribution_test.go covers ordering/exclusion/found_by-zero.
--merge clusters by (location key, class) with representatives + found_by attribution, replacing text-similarity dedup; audit --record path untouched (review_merge_test.go).
OverlapReport computes unique/shared, trim_candidate=unique0&&shared>=1, excludes regression/blank; surfaced in merge/report/status (review_overlap.go, review_report.go 107-111, review_status.go 61).
computeMechanizeCandidates unchanged (>=2 rounds or >=5 in one round); no per-round multi-role signal and no found_by threshold constant added.
review_roles_hash stored on round entry at record time; audit_record.go 88-110 stores audit_roles_hash; ReviewRound.RolesHash field; sequences independent; roles_hash_record_test.go covers.

--status computes corpus hash and reports roles_stale beside spec stale without writing; audit_record.go 166-174 same for audit; RolesStale treats empty stored hash (pre-v0.25.0) as matching (reviewstate.go 183-192).
parseRoleOverrides parses tp.review_roles/audit_roles maps; only focus permitted, other keys warned+ignored; ReviewRoles/AuditRoles fields; frontmatter_roleoverrides_test.go covers.
Read-time layering appends override focus after corpus focus; unknown-id warned; regression never passed here so accepts no overrides; overrides_test.go covers.
TranslateLegacyLens: lens.all fans to active review roles, lens.<id> to that role, unknown warned, new form wins over legacy, deprecation warning; lens_shim_test.go covers.
No Go persona-swap by domain remains; fmState.Domain feeds only ResolveActiveCorpus (corpus select+filter); domain_lens_test.go confirms.
lintRoleCorpusOrAbort validates both phases with exit 3 + 'repair or delete' hint; review aborts on bad reviewer, audit on bad auditor (phase-independent); lint_corpus_test.go covers.
--eject-roles [--domain] writes byte-identical default corpus; unknown domain is usage error exit 2 listing known domains; refuses overwrite unless --force; init_eject_test.go covers.
Discovery chain: --file > TP_FILE > .tp/local.json active > auto-detect; no .tp-active read; discover_test.go/backcompat_test.go confirm it is ignored.
Root .gitignore has no .tp-active line (grep 0 matches); gitignore_test.go asserts .tp-active is not gitignored.
TestEject_EmissionNeutral asserts byte-identical prompts; TestEject_FlipsHashAndStalesOnce asserts builtin->file hash flip stales one round then re-baselines.
All 8 non-goals asserted across cli/nongoals_test.go and engine/nongoals_test.go; suite passes.
Identical software panel + prose two-lens change; pre-v0.25.0 round carries forward (roles_stale false); .tp-active removal needs no action (local.json used).
Section 14 guidance: 5 principles, worked code/software + prose examples, and legal/product/data-schema/academic domain catalog; notes defaults exemplify guidance.
README has zero .tp-active refs; SKILL/REFERENCE/CLAUDE mention it only as removed-in-v0.25.0 history; local.json described as sole active mechanism.
README documents role corpus dir, eject-roles with --domain/--force, review_roles/audit_roles overrides, per-role overlap, and role staleness.
REFERENCE documents role schema, eject command/flags, frontmatter overrides, overlap fields (found_by/found_by_roles/overlap_report), roles_stale, and lint-abort exit 3.
SKILL documents eject-roles, frontmatter overrides, corpus-driven emission, per-role overlap report, roles_stale, and role validation in lint/review/audit.
CLAUDE.md self-dev rules + pre-release checklist cover v0.25.0 role corpus, eject, removed .tp-active, and note repo stays on embedded corpus while dogfooding new paths.
git invoked via exec.Command with arg arrays (no shell), affected files validated with os.Stat, errors handled/exited; no locks, no file writes.

State mutated under WithReviewStateLock (deferred release), round file written 0o600 via filepath.Join, all critical errors (load/write/save/hash) checked; ignored rolesHash err has safe zero-value fallback.
Read-only; os.Open with defer Close and scanner.Err checked; paths via filepath.Join; optional task-file read degrades gracefully. No locks/writes.

Only write is snapshot (0o600, writeErr checked, path via filepath.Join+int); all os.ReadFile/os.Open errors handled or gracefully skipped; concatenations build prompt/display strings, not paths/queries. No locks.
Input files existence-checked, JSON + required fields validated; output written 0o600. Ignored f.Close on read file is benign. No locks needed (no shared-state mutation).
Round recorded under WithReviewStateLock (deferred release), round file written 0o600 via filepath.Join, load/write/save errors checked; ignored rolesHash/wf errs have safe fallbacks.
Read-only (never writes state); spec/diff-from/findings inputs validated with os.Stat; concatenations are label/prompt text. mechChecks ignored err is best-effort with results still shown.
Read-only; files validated, directory scan uses filepath.Join, parseNDJSONFile uses defer Close and returns scanner.Err. Stdout writes explicitly discard err (benign). No locks.
Read-only; specPath validated; mechanical checks run only author-registered+ValidateChecks'd commands. Ignored rolesHash err has safe fallback. No locks/writes.

Path-traversal guarded via filepath.Rel + HasPrefix(rel,"..") reject outside project root; writes under WithFileLock (deferred release); LoadLocalConfig/Write errors handled. Dir MkdirAll 0o755 (dir, not file).
Static role JSON: id==stem "security", only allowed keys (id/title/instructions/focus), required fields present; validated by ParseRoleBytes. No code surface.

Path built by concat but domain is allowlist-validated via defaultCorpusOrder[domain], phase/id are internal constants, target is read-only embed.FS (traversal-immune); errors wrapped/returned. No locks/writes.
Exhaustive type-assertion validation on all YAML input with warn-and-ignore degradation; ReadFile err -> defaults, YAML parse err -> lint error. No locks/writes, no path building from input.
Pure in-memory translation function; nil-safe, deterministic; no I/O, no locks, no writes, no query/path construction. No security surface.

WithReviewStateLock wraps WithFileLock (deferred release); SaveReviewState writes 0o600; paths via filepath.Join; corrupt-state surfaced as error; documented graceful skips on missing/unparseable round rows.

Thorough input validation: top-level key allowlist, domains type check, id==stem, kebab-case regex, reserved-id + required-field checks; errors wrapped/returned. No locks/writes; paths via filepath.Base/Ext.

ChecklistItem (only exported symbol) has a doc comment; 7 fmt.Errorf calls all create new errors (no error value to wrap, so %w N/A); idiomatic camelCase; no TODO/FIXME. Minor: runAudit L125-231 is ~107 lines, modestly over the ~80 guideline but a cohesive linear command handler.

Propagated error correctly wrapped with %w at L128; %v uses at L42/57/156 are terminal output.Error(Sprintf) calls (not propagated), which is correct; all functions <=65 lines; no exported symbols; no TODO/FIXME.
All functions <=49 lines; no fmt.Errorf (terminal errors via output.Error); no exported symbols; idiomatic camelCase naming; no TODO/FIXME.
Three functions, all <=57 lines; no exported symbols; idiomatic naming; no fmt.Errorf propagation issues; no TODO/FIXME.
Largest function runLint is 76 lines (within ~80); no exported symbols; idiomatic naming; no fmt.Errorf propagation issues; no TODO/FIXME.

runReview L302-806 is ~505 lines (~6x the ~80-line guideline); newReviewCmd L85-211 ~127, buildFindingsSummary L1023-1139 ~117 also well over. Errors all new validation msgs (%w N/A), no exported symbols, naming idiomatic, no TODO. Length-only maintainability concern.

runReviewMerge L15-174 is ~160 lines (~2x the ~80 guideline) doing validate+parse+cluster+sort+emit in one function. Otherwise clean: helpers documented, no propagation issues, idiomatic naming, no TODO.
Three small functions (<=16 lines); no exported symbols; idiomatic naming; no fmt.Errorf; no TODO/FIXME.

parseRecordRows L145 propagates jsonErr with %v (returns it up to caller) instead of %w, dropping the error chain; the exactly-parallel countAuditFindings in audit_record.go:128 correctly uses %w. Also runReviewRecord L20-130 ~111 lines, modestly over ~80. Doc comments/naming otherwise fine, no TODO.

No exported symbols; no fmt.Errorf (terminal errors via output.Error); idiomatic naming; no TODO/FIXME. Minor: runReviewRegression L18-119 ~102 lines, slightly over the ~80 guideline but a cohesive linear flow.
